A new Chinese artificial intelligence agent platform is looking to replicate the “lobster craze” sparked by AI agent tool OpenClaw earlier this year, while avoiding some of the privacy and security risks associated with the open-source software.
MuleRun, developed by Chinese tech giant Alibaba Group

news.headline: Victorian greyhound trainer avoids ban despite dog being found with cocaine in system
news.summary: <p>Tribunal decision on Geoffrey Dalton comes as advocacy group releases data showing 30 greyhounds have died at or after Victorian races this year</p><ul><li><p>Get our <a href="https://www.theguardian.com/email-newsletters?CMP=cvau_sfl">breaking news email</a

news.headline: Why has Trump threatened to bomb Oman, amid Iran war escalation?
news.summary: The US president has issued a stark warning to a US ally, in a sign of rising tensions over Strait of Hormuz.

news.headline: Solar, so good: Hong Kong’s new landfill-based plant can power 360 homes
news.summary:
Hong Kong has launched a new solar farm built on restored landfill in Tseung Kwan O that aims to cut carbon emissions by an amount equivalent to planting about 20,000 trees each year.
Jointly developed by environmental services firm Veolia and developers Sun Hung Kai Properties (SHKP) and Citic Paci

news.headline: The kingmakers of Makerfield: English town braces for crucial by-election
news.summary: On June 18, voters will determine the fate of Andy Burnham, a possible contender to replace embattled PM Starmer.

news.headline: Brazil World Cup 2026 team preview: Players to watch, group matches, squad
news.summary: While one of the least fancied Brazilian World Cup sides of all time, Ancelotti's squad is still loaded with talent.

news.headline: Hottest year on record almost certain to occur by end of 2030, UN warns
news.summary: Warning comes as Western Europe experiences a heatwave, with temperatures reaching highs not expected until the summer.

news.headline: Jury considers verdict for man accused of plotting Taylor Swift concert attack
news.summary: The main suspect, identified as Beran A, has admitted to a charge of "being part of a terrorist organisation".

news.headline: ‘Donald Trump’ buffalo in Bangladesh will be spared sacrifice
news.summary: An albino buffalo with a blond forelock has shot to fame in Bangladesh as people say it resembles Donald Trump.

news.headline: GCC Chief condemns ongoing Iranian attacks on Kuwait as ‘flagrant’ violation of international law
news.summary: GCC Secretary-General strongly condemns continued Iranian attacks on Kuwait
